sections.paragraph:
-

(1) i.q. לָאַט, לָהַט No. II, to cover over, to hide, to wrap up. Part. acc. לֹוט hiding, Isa 25:7 and another form לָט intrans. hidden, secret; whence בַּלָּט secretly, Rth 3:7 1Sa 18:22 24:5 once בַּלָּאט Jud. 4:21 . Part. pass. f. לוּטָה wrapped up, 1Sa 21:10.

(2) to do secretly. Part. pl. לָמִים secret arts, incantations, Exo 7:22 8:3 , 14 instead of which there is לְהָמִים Exo 7:11 see לַהַט .

Hiphil, i.q. Kal, No. 1, 1Ki 19:13.

Hence לֹט and-
